positive: A mystical, stylized portrait of a gentle forest spirit composed of intertwined bioluminescent moss, delicate ferns, and glowing mycelial roots. The spirit's form should be an ethereal, semi-transparent silhouette against a deep twilight forest background. Focus on intricate, glowing textures and natural, glowing accents (electric blue, emerald green, soft gold). Composition must be centered, allowing the silhouette to float prominently. Highly detailed, vector-art style with sharp lines, strong contrast between the glowing subject and the dark background, suitable for screen printing. Minimalist, high contrast, dramatic backlighting, symmetrical composition.
negative: blurry, deformed, artifacts, text, watermarks, logo, signature, watermark, low contrast, grainy, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise
